author: fix-pendingresponse
content: VDD R2 NOT CONVERGED — Verdict: Sloppy. PendingResponse fix correct (not modified), event change to onHeadersReceived correct. BUT: (1) parquet_schema.py NOT updated with redirect_url — critical schema desync, silent data loss for Parquet users, (2) test_values.py NOT updated, (3) redirect_url column not tested in dns test, (4) type annotation inconsistency between listener and handler params. Needs R3.
